title: ReAct Loop State
description: Shared state threaded across the reasoner -> researcher -> summarizer ReAct cycle.

question.description: The user's original question to answer.

reasoning.description: Accumulated chain-of-thought reasoning from the reasoner agent.

intent.description: The reasoner's decision: 'search' to invoke the researcher, 'done' to finalize.

search_query.description: Query the reasoner wants the researcher to look up (set when intent is 'search').

research_results.description: Information returned by the researcher agent.

answer.description: Final answer produced by the summarizer agent.

iteration.description: Current loop iteration count (incremented by the reasoner each pass).
